metadata.title: Bill Payment | Utility Payments | Meezan Bank
metadata.description: You can now pay your bills through Meezan Internet Banking – offering an easy and convenient way to pay bills in just a few steps. Login to your Internet Banking account and select ‘Bills & Top ups’ to add beneficiaries & make bill payments instantly.

content: Meezan EBiz+ LITE Login Meezan EBiz+ Login EBiz+ LITE Login EBiz+ Login If you found this page informative, share it now! Facebook LinkedIn X WhatsApp Email Print Bill Payments Meezan Bank now offers one of the largest portfolios of bill payments in the country! You can now pay your bills through Meezan Internet Banking – offering an easy and convenient way to pay bills in just a few steps. Login to your Internet Banking account and select 'Bills & Top ups' to add beneficiaries & make payments instantly.
